tool.name: bootstrap_session_profile_from_browser
tool.description: Extract reusable cookies, localStorage/sessionStorage tokens, CSRF material, and browser-page auth hints from the active browser tab, then save them as a session profile for later authorization testing.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: Human-readable session profile name such as owner, admin-browser, or tenant-b-user.

parameter.name: role
parameter.description: Optional role label to attach to the saved browser-derived session profile.

parameter.name: tenant
parameter.description: Optional tenant or account label for later cross-tenant comparisons.

parameter.name: tab_id
parameter.description: Optional browser tab identifier. Defaults to the currently active tab.

parameter.name: base_url
parameter.description: Optional explicit base URL override. When omitted, the current page origin is used.

parameter.name: notes
parameter.description: Optional operator notes to append to the saved session profile.

parameter.name: allow_anonymous
parameter.description: Whether to save the profile even if no cookies or auth material are found. Default: false.

tool.name: confirm_active_artifact_in_browser
tool.description: Load a potentially dangerous artifact in the currently launched browser, instrument alert/confirm/prompt and console activity, and confirm whether active client-side execution is actually reachable.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label used for evidence and hypothesis recording.

parameter.name: surface
parameter.description: Human-readable surface description for the artifact being loaded in-browser.

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Absolute http(s) URL of the artifact to load and inspect in the active browser context.

parameter.name: viewer_urls
parameter.description: Optional viewer or workflow URLs to replay before falling back to loading the artifact directly. Use this when the artifact must be rendered inside an application page to prove impact.

parameter.name: artifact_filename
parameter.description: Optional artifact filename used to identify matching DOM references on viewer pages, such as avatar.svg or shell.php.jpg.

parameter.name: expected_console_markers
parameter.description: Optional console markers expected to appear if the artifact executes, such as custom console.log markers.

parameter.name: expected_dom_markers
parameter.description: Optional DOM/content markers that should be searched inside the loaded document or active attributes.

parameter.name: wait_seconds
parameter.description: How long to wait after navigation before collecting console and DOM signals. Default: 1.5.

parameter.name: open_artifact_directly_if_missing
parameter.description: When true, load the artifact directly if no supplied viewer page references it. Default: true.

parameter.name: persist_hypothesis
parameter.description: Whether confirmed browser execution should create a stored XSS hypothesis. Default: true.
